name: 熊刀（★） | 致命紫罗兰
descriptionEn: This tanto-style survival knife features a faceted blade and full tang, complete with impact pommel. No fuss, no moving parts - just a reliable blade that's ready to work. It has individual parts spray-painted solid colors in a black and purple color scheme. Elegant design paired with brutal intent
descriptionZh: 这把日式短刀风格的求生刀具拥有多面刀刃和带握点的全刀柄。没有任何多余的部分 - 一把时刻准备战斗的可靠武器。 这把武器的部分零件以黑色和紫色的配色方案进行了整体喷漆。 高贵的图案下暗藏着残忍卑鄙的阴谋
